theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with a warm reading twist
theme_and_archetype.description: An immersive, cinematic, and moody dark-first mobile web experience that feels premium and focused. It uses deep obsidian backgrounds combined with Warm Amber to give a 'paper' feel to an otherwise digital environment.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F5F5F6] font-sans
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight text-[#F5F5F6] font-sans

layouts.appContainer: min-h-screen bg-[#0A0A0B] text-[#F5F5F6] flex flex-col selection:bg-[#FFB000]/30
layouts.libraryGrid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6
layouts.readerContainer: flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-6 py-12 md:px-12 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full
layouts.bottomNav: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/80 border-t border-white/5 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-safe z-50
layouts.topToolbar: fixed top-0 w-full h-16 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0B]/80 border-b border-white/5 flex justify-between items-center px-4 pt-safe z-50

components.bookCard: relative group rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-[#141416] border border-white/5 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 hover:shadow-2xl shadow-black/50 cursor-pointer
components.progressBar: h-1 w-full bg-white/10 rounded-full overflow-hidden mt-3
components.aiAssistantDrawer: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 bg-[#141416] border-t border-white/10 rounded-t-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] z-[60] transform transition-transform duration-300
components.editorToolbar: fixed bottom-24 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#1C1C1E]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-full px-4 py-2 shadow-2xl z-40

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFB000] text-black font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-[#E59E00] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 cursor-pointer
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 cursor-pointer
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 text-white/70 hover:text-[#FFB000] transition-colors cursor-pointer

image_urls.description: white and red heart print paper on white textile
A black and white abstract cover

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Manrope' (for UI) and 'Spectral' (for reading view).
Install lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react for icons. Phosphor is preferred for its high-end duotone feel.
The Library screen should have a grid of book covers using the provided image URLs.

For the Reader Screen, use Spectral font with high line-height (`leading-[1.8]`), text size `text-lg` to `text-xl`, and color `#E6E4DF`. Implement a 'Paper Mode' toggle that switches the background to an off-white/sepia (`bg-[#F4F1EA]`) and text to dark gray (`text-[#2A2A2A]`).
The Editor Screen must have a floating toolbar at the bottom for rich text formatting. Avoid bulky fixed headers.
The AI Assistant panel should be an overlay drawer sliding up from the bottom when invoked in the Editor.
The Bottom Tab Navigation must use a heavy glassmorphism effect (`backdrop-blur-2xl`) and stay fixed at the bottom.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="library-tab-button"`).
Do not use default Shadcn cards for everything; use the custom `bookCard` styles for the library.
